## Analysis

### Game Flow Reconstruction

*Chronological summary of a typical fight arc: what happened, in what order, and at what moments gameplay diverged from expected patterns.*

[Summary of the typical fight sequence. When did leads change? When did synergies fire? At what turn did most fights resolve?]

### Strategic Observations

*What strategies worked, what was ignored, what felt dominant, what felt useless.*

[Which builds were overrepresented in wins? Which tactics appeared most/least often? What combinations were never effective?]

### Balance Assessment

*Per-system: what felt over/under-tuned and why, with supporting data.*

| System/Build | Finding | Supporting Data |
|-------------|---------|----------------|
| [Build A] | [over/under-tuned] | Win rate N% vs expected ~33% |

### Design Recommendations

*Specific, actionable. One recommendation per observed problem.*

1. **[Change X]** — observed [Y] (data: [Z]). Suggested adjustment: [specific value change].
2. **[Change X]** — ...

## Confidence Rating

**[low/medium/high]**

Factors affecting confidence:
- [ ] GDD rules were unambiguous for all simulated actions
- [ ] All builds were tested with sufficient iterations (≥200 per matchup)
- [ ] No dominant single-build win rate exceeded 70% (suggests model validity)

---

*Rules in the GDD that were ambiguous or missing. Simulation made an assumption for each — verify with designer.*

| Rule | Ambiguity | Assumption Made |
|------|-----------|----------------|
